response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with strong TypeScript, architecture, and cloud skills. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement demanding 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. His exposure to AI agents and MCP is very recent, and his resume completely lacks Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, making him a poor fit for this specialized GenAI role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud deployments (AWS CDK, Kubernetes).
Proven ability to build scalable data platforms and high-throughput microservices.
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8+ years of experience building AI solutions.
No experience listed with Python, vector databases, or RAG architectures.
Lacks demonstrated experience in customer-facing technical discovery for enterprise AI.
